subject: (no subject)
body: JP>> I DO NOT WANT LIMESTONE ANYWHERE ON THE ISLAND>> I've been very clear  no jerusalem stone., no fru fru cornices, no francelli wood floor in the office.  I saw the budget, IT's crazy,, I   the spanish workers left after a week with two samples that werenot as good as omars, please talk to dan,, he didn't even know what they were doing.. you need to maintain credibility.  IT can't be 6 million dollars for a one room no bathroom building. francellu is to only build cabinets, you and I cancelled the jerussalem stone three times..
